name: stripe-bg-guides-demo
visual_summary: A Stripe-like animated background component. This component is useful when you want to add a visually engaging and dynamic background effect to your application, inspired by Stripe's design system.
generation_prompt:

Name: stripe-bg-guides-demo
Description: A Stripe-like animated background component. This component is useful when you want to add a visually engaging and dynamic background effect to your application, inspired by Stripe's design system.
Style: dark, glassmorphism
Interactions: animated, hover
Tags: stripe, animation, background, dynamic

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
